title: Move storage traits and models
purpose: Establish the storage contract in libmessage so that PG and Redis implementations can target a stable trait surface owned by the messaging domain, not the storage crate.
task: Move the StorageError enum, the MessagingStorage trait, and all model types (inbox items, notification records, read status) from meridian-services into libmessage/src/storage/. Update all downstream crates to import from the new location. Fix the notification bug where read-status updates don't clear the notification entry (C7 — one-line fix in the file being moved).

requirements.title: Move StorageError to libmessage
requirements.spec: WHEN any libmessage operation encounters a storage failure THE SYSTEM SHALL return a StorageError from libmessage::storage::error AND it SHALL NOT reference meridian_storage error types directly.
acceptance: All downstream crates compile against the new path

requirements.title: Move MessagingStorage trait
requirements.spec: WHEN a service needs to persist or retrieve messaging data THE SYSTEM SHALL use the MessagingStorage trait from libmessage::storage::traits AND it SHALL NOT import storage traits from meridian-services.
acceptance: PG implementation compiles against the new trait location

requirements.title: Move model types
requirements.spec: WHEN any crate needs messaging model types (inbox items, notification records, read status) THE SYSTEM SHALL import them from libmessage::storage::models AND it SHALL NOT import them from meridian-services::messaging.
acceptance: All model types defined in libmessage::storage::models
No downstream crate imports model types from the old location

requirements.title: Fix notification read-status bug
requirements.spec: WHEN a message's read status is updated THE SYSTEM SHALL also delete the corresponding notification entry AND it SHALL NOT leave stale notifications after read-status changes.
acceptance: read_status update clears the matching notification row
No stale notifications remain after marking a message as read

boundaries: SHALL NOT add new storage operations (M-003 scope)
SHALL NOT change the StorageError variant set
SHALL NOT modify the PG migration files
verification: all downstream crates compile against the new paths
notification bug fix verified: read-status update clears notification entry
